mapper.select: SELECT sj.*, r.report_name, jt.trigger_type, jt.timezone, jt.start_type, jt.cron_expression, jt.occurrence_count, jt.recurrence_interval, jt.recurrence_interval_unit, jmn.notification_id, jmn.subject, jmn.message_text, jmn.result_send_type, jmn.skip_empty_reports, jmn.skip_notif_on_fail, jmn.include_stacktrace_on_fail FROM dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB sj JOIN dbo.REPORT r ON sj.report_id = r.report_id LEFT JOIN dbo.JOB_TRIGGER jt ON sj.job_id = jt.job_id LEFT JOIN dbo.JOB_MAIL_NOTIFICATION jmn ON sj.job_id = jmn.job_id ORDER BY sj.job_id DESC

SELECT sj.*, r.report_name, jt.trigger_type, jt.timezone, jt.start_type, jt.cron_expression, jt.occurrence_count, jt.recurrence_interval, jt.recurrence_interval_unit, jmn.notification_id, jmn.subject, jmn.message_text, jmn.result_send_type, jmn.skip_empty_reports, jmn.skip_notif_on_fail, jmn.include_stacktrace_on_fail FROM dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB sj JOIN dbo.REPORT r ON sj.report_id = r.report_id LEFT JOIN dbo.JOB_TRIGGER jt ON sj.job_id = jt.job_id LEFT JOIN dbo.JOB_MAIL_NOTIFICATION jmn ON sj.job_id = jmn.job_id WHERE sj.status = #{status} ORDER BY sj.job_id DESC

SELECT sj.*, r.report_name, r.jasper_report_uri, jt.trigger_type, jt.timezone, jt.start_type, jt.cron_expression, jt.start_date, jt.end_date, jt.misfire_instruction, jt.occurrence_count, jt.recurrence_interval, jt.recurrence_interval_unit, jmn.notification_id, jmn.subject, jmn.message_text, jmn.result_send_type, jmn.skip_empty_reports, jmn.skip_notif_on_fail, jmn.include_stacktrace_on_fail FROM dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB sj JOIN dbo.REPORT r ON sj.report_id = r.report_id LEFT JOIN dbo.JOB_TRIGGER jt ON sj.job_id = jt.job_id LEFT JOIN dbo.JOB_MAIL_NOTIFICATION jmn ON sj.job_id = jmn.job_id WHERE sj.job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB (report_id, job_label, job_description, output_formats, base_output_filename, output_timezone, repo_folder_uri, repo_save_to_repository, repo_overwrite_files, repo_sequential_filenames, status, created_by) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{jobLabel}, #{jobDescription}, #{outputFormats}, #{baseOutputFilename}, #{outputTimezone}, #{repoFolderUri}, #{repoSaveToRepository}, #{repoOverwriteFiles}, #{repoSequentialFilenames}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB SET report_id = #{reportId}, job_label = #{jobLabel}, job_description = #{jobDescription}, output_formats = #{outputFormats}, base_output_filename = #{baseOutputFilename}, output_timezone = #{outputTimezone}, repo_folder_uri = #{repoFolderUri}, repo_save_to_repository = #{repoSaveToRepository}, repo_overwrite_files = #{repoOverwriteFiles}, repo_sequential_filenames = #{repoSequentialFilenames}, updated_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
UPDATE dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB SET status = #{status}, updated_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
UPDATE dbo.SCHEDULE_JOB SET jasper_job_id = #{jasperJobId} WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.JOB_TRIGGER (job_id, trigger_type, timezone, start_type, start_date, end_date, misfire_instruction, occurrence_count, recurrence_interval, recurrence_interval_unit, cron_expression) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{triggerType}, #{timezone}, #{startType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{misfireInstruction}, #{occurrenceCount}, #{recurrenceInterval}, #{recurrenceIntervalUnit}, #{cronExpression})
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.JOB_TRIGGER SET trigger_type = #{triggerType}, timezone = #{timezone}, start_type = #{startType}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, misfire_instruction = #{misfireInstruction}, occurrence_count = #{occurrenceCount}, recurrence_interval = #{recurrenceInterval}, recurrence_interval_unit = #{recurrenceIntervalUnit}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression} WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.JOB_MAIL_NOTIFICATION (job_id, subject, message_text, result_send_type, skip_empty_reports, skip_notif_on_fail, include_stacktrace_on_fail) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{subject}, #{messageText}, #{resultSendType}, #{skipEmptyReports}, #{skipNotifOnFail}, #{includeStacktraceOnFail})
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.JOB_MAIL_NOTIFICATION SET subject = #{subject}, message_text = #{messageText}, result_send_type = #{resultSendType}, skip_empty_reports = #{skipEmptyReports}, skip_notif_on_fail = #{skipNotifOnFail}, include_stacktrace_on_fail = #{includeStacktraceOnFail} WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.JOB_RECIPIENT_INTERNAL (notification_id, recipient_mode, role, company, recipient_type) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{recipientMode}, #{role}, #{company}, #{recipientType})
INSERT INTO dbo.JOB_RECIPIENT_EXTERNAL (notification_id, contact_email, recipient_type) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{contactEmail}, #{recipientType})
mapper.select: SELECT recipient_id, notification_id, recipient_mode, role, company, recipient_type FROM dbo.JOB_RECIPIENT_INTERNAL WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId}
SELECT recipient_id, notification_id, contact_email, recipient_type FROM dbo.JOB_RECIPIENT_EXTERNAL WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.JOB_REPORT_PARAM (job_id, param_def_id, param_value, is_dynamic, dynamic_expr) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{paramDefId}, #{paramValue}, #{isDynamic}, #{dynamicExpr})
mapper.select: SELECT jrp.param_id, jrp.job_id, jrp.param_def_id, rpd.param_name, jrp.param_value, jrp.is_dynamic, jrp.dynamic_expr FROM dbo.JOB_REPORT_PARAM jrp JOIN dbo.REPORT_PARAM_DEF rpd ON jrp.param_def_id = rpd.param_def_id WHERE jrp.job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY rpd.display_order
